name: slides-for-vertical-writing
description: This directory contains various slide presentations organized by topic.

scripts.serve:current: pnpm run build:current && pnpm exec serve pages
scripts.serve:all: pnpm run build:all && pnpm exec serve pages
scripts.link:local: git diff --quiet pnpm-workspace.yaml || echo '⚠️  pnpm-workspace.yaml has uncommitted changes. Run unlink:local before committing.' && pnpm link ../slide-system-for-vertical-writing
scripts.unlink:local: test -L node_modules/@berlysia/vertical-writing-slide-system && (git checkout pnpm-workspace.yaml && pnpm install) || echo '⚠️  Not linked. Nothing to unlink.'
